name: kos-cli
description: Knowledge Operating System CLI v0 — validate, ingest, compile, and run controlled documentation tasks against a KOS vault.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const{cpSync,existsSync}=require('fs');cpSync('src/workers/prompts','dist/workers/prompts',{recursive:true});const F=['00 Inbox','01 Kernel','02 Vision','03 Product','04 Domain','05 Architecture','06 Decisions','07 Research','08 Business','09 Roadmap','10 Operations','11 Proposals','90 Meta','99 Archive'];for(const f of F){if(existsSync(f))cpSync(f,'dist/templates/vault/'+f,{recursive:true})}if(existsSync('Home.md'))cpSync('Home.md','dist/templates/vault/Home.md')"
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run knip
